risk_summary: Political and Governance risk category has been rated as 'High' in the current assessment, up from 'Substantial' at project approval. This elevation indicates emerging or worsening governance fragility affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Proposed Rating: High (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 02 - 02 Apr 2024: Substantial)

risk_summary: Macroeconomic risk has been rated as 'High' in the current assessment, elevated from 'Substantial' at approval. This worsening macroeconomic environment may constrain government capacity to support project implementation and service delivery in fragile merged areas.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Macroeconomic - Proposed Rating: High (Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 02 - 02 Apr 2024: Substantial)

risk_title: Staffing Instability at Project Coordination Unit
risk_summary: Staffing changes at the Project Coordination and Management Unit (PCMU) have caused delays in key project actions. While progress is picking up, this institutional instability in a fragile governance context poses risks to sustained implementation.
evidence_quote: Due to staffing changes at the PCMU, several key actions are delayed, but progress is now picking up.
